suite.name: ContractAndSchemaTests
suite.case: session tool permission hook telemetry and context handoff schema conformance
negative tests for malformed contracts and contradictory constraints

suite.name: PromptFrameworkLintTests
suite.case: verify every execution prompt includes required hybrid framework fields
detect contradictions between do and dont constraints

suite.name: ContextManagementTests
suite.case: handoff packet completeness and checksum validation
resume after compaction preserves active objective and acceptance gates

suite.name: LifecycleAndRecoveryTests
suite.case: client restart and session resume integrity under induced failures
abort timeout and pending request cleanup behavior

suite.name: ReplayAndStressTests
suite.case: concurrent multi-session stress with tool and permission contention
failure injection for MCP outage, malformed tool results, and transport interruptions

releaseQualityGates.gate: Replay baseline is deterministic and green.
Prompt lint and contradiction tests are green.
